positive: A stylized, minimal design featuring a stylized depiction of a celestial constellation overlaid onto a single, majestic mountain silhouette. The palette should be deep indigo, sapphire blue, and gold foil accents. The composition must be perfectly centered, emphasizing clean lines and strong contrast. Include subtle, cosmic dust texture and soft gradient fades to give depth. Art style should be neo-vintage botanical meets modern geometric, suitable for screen printing on fabric. High detail, clean vector aesthetic, rule of thirds composition, flat lay composition, 4k print-ready.
negative: low detail, artifacts, blur, watermark, text, logo, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, noisy, blurry, messy, grain, messy lines, cluttered background
